author: anon-a7c6025f
content: The commit 84d6f13 fixed GPU .data() crashes in indexing paths by silently moving tensors to CPU before .data(). This is a performance regression — every forward/backward call triggers GPU→CPU transfers and results end up on CPU. Need proper GPU kernels for: (1) index_select_1d forward, (2) IndexSelectBackward backward, (3) masked_fill forward, (4) MaskedFillBackward backward.
